name: io.github.attenlabs/hotato
description: Open-source, self-hosted conversation QA for voice agents. MIT.

packageArguments.description: uvx flag: install the named package (with extras) and run a console script from it, rather than the bare 'hotato' script
hotato with the mcp extra, so the hotato-mcp console script and its mcp>=1.2.0 dependency are installed
console script entry point: the hotato MCP server (the voice_eval_run scorer plus eight read/verify/propose and clone-scoped fleet tools), stdio transport
